zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency於1243年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希時，她的父親Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II29歲，母親Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais15歲。她於1260年之前與Robert IV do Poissy在法國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1292年9月3日在法國奧其坦尼賀勞爾特福洛倫瑟阿享年49歲，埋葬在法國奧其坦尼賀勞爾特福洛倫瑟阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency于1243年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希时，她的父亲Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II29岁，母亲Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais15岁。她于1260年之前与Robert IV do Poissy在法国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1292年9月3日在法国奧其坦尼賀勞爾特福洛倫瑟阿享年49岁，埋葬在法国奧其坦尼賀勞爾特福洛倫瑟阿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marly
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Manley  .

variants.name: Manley
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Devon and Cheshire, named in Old English as ‘common wood or clearing’, from (ge)mǣne ‘common, shared’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The surname is still chiefly found in the regions around these villages.
English: nickname from Middle Englishmannly ‘manly, virile, brave’ (Old Englishmannlīc, originally ‘man-like’).
Irish (County Cork): Anglicized form of Ó Máinle (and often pronounced Mauly), of unexplained etymology. Compare Malley .

en.lifeSummary: When Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency was born in 1243, in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, her father, Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II, was 29 and her mother, Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais, was 15. She married Robert IV do Poissy before 1260, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 3 September 1292, in Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, France, at the age of 49, and was buried in Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency est née en 1243, à Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, son père, Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Robert IV do Poissy avant 1260, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 septembre 1292, à Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, France, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, France.

de.Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Franc: Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency 1243 in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II 29 und ihre Mutter Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais 15. Sie hat vor 1260 in Frankreich Robert IV do Poissy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. September 1292 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, Frankreich und wurde in Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, Frankreich begraben.

Lei sposato Robert IV do Poissy prima del 1260, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 3 settembre 1292, nel Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Florensac, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Marly de Montmorencyが1243年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼモントモーエンシで生まれた時，父Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly IIは29歳，母Agnès De Beaumont Gatinaisは15歳であった。1260年以前にフランスでRobert IV do Poissyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1292年9月3日にフランスオクシタニーheラウルトフロアンサックで49歳で死去し，フランスオクシタニーheラウルトフロアンサックにて埋葬された。

ko.Olivet, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Franc: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라이베트
ko.lifeSummary: Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency(이)가 1243년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1260년 이전 프랑스에서 Robert IV do Poissy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1292년 9월 3일 프랑스 옥시탠이 he라트 플로렌사크에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 옥시탠이 he라트 플로렌사크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency nasceu em 1243, em Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert IV do Poissy antes 1260, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabeau de Marly de Montmorency родилась в 1243 г. в местности монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Bouchard de Montmorency-Marly II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnès De Beaumont Gatinais, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert IV do Poissy перед 1260 г. в местности Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 сентября 1292 г. в местности флоренсак, хeраулт, окситани, Франция в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности флоренсак, хeраулт, окситани, Франция.
